{{CargoRelic
|name=Laurel Wine
|class_id=20533
|rank=Green
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=The laurel tree cut by Wu Gang for thousands of years remains vibrant and alive. Every Mid-Autumn Festival, the laurel tree will bloom fragrant flowers, which are then brewed into a delicious wine, unparalleled in both heaven and earth!
|fame=14
|art=17
|fth=15
|civ=31
|tech=13
|ss1=Per Incense used, Snail ATK +3<br>Incense Used: 20/20
|ss2=Per Incense used, Snail ATK +6<br>Incense Used: 20/20
|ss3=Per Incense used, Snail ATK +9<br>Incense Used: 20/20
|ss4=Per Incense used, Snail ATK +9<br>Incense Used: 20/20
|ss7=Per Incense used, Snail ATK +9<br>Incense Used: 20/20<br> (Awakened)
}}
